blockingIssues.description: Buy-order cancellation unlocks only quote principal and does not release the fee reserve now locked at bid placement, leaving funds stranded in locked balance for non-zero-fee cancellations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a required lock-lifecycle verification checklist: for any change to lock amounts (including fee reserves), reviewers/workers must verify and test all corresponding settlement and cancel unlock/debit paths so every lock source has an explicit release path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-fee-lock-accounting updated bid lock semantics in contracts/sources/order_placement.move:149 but cancel path remained principal-only in contracts/sources/cancel.move:122, leaving locked fee reserve stranded.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a new mission/library convention specifically for lock-accounting updates across placement/settlement/cancel.
rejectedObservations.reason: best handled as procedural guidance in move-worker skill rather than duplicating normative rules across mission/library docs
